ground_truth.description: Obviously a photo of Oberbaumbrücke in Berlin, taken from the bridge looking at the bridge.
ground_truth.photographer_description: Obviously a photo of the Oberbaumbrücke in Berlin, taken from the bridge, looking at the bridge. Daytime, cloudy.

details.description: Street-level view of a historic red‑brick bridge with two cylindrical towers capped by conical spires and small finials. The bridge features Gothic Revival detailing: pointed brick arcades, crenellations, roundels, and patterned brickwork. Cars and a white delivery van are crossing; pedestrians walk along the sidewalk in the foreground beside a cycle lane and low concrete dividers with graffiti. Modern, slim streetlights line the walkway. A contemporary building with a light/golden geometric facade rises behind the bridge. Portions of the upper deck’s steelwork for the elevated railway are visible between the towers. Lighting is diffuse under a cloudy sky.

entities.name: Oberbaumbrücke
entities.notes: Iconic double-towered bridge linking Kreuzberg and Friedrichshain over the River Spree; a symbol of Berlin.

entities.name: Oberbaumbrücke (road and rail bridge)
entities.notes: Two-level bridge carrying road traffic and the Berlin U-Bahn; completed in the 1890s, largely designed by Otto Stahn.

entities.name: Brick Gothic Revival architecture
entities.notes: Backstein-Neogotik with pointed arches, crenellations, and conical turrets; late 19th century.

entities.name: Berlin U-Bahn on Oberbaumbrücke (U1/U3)
entities.notes: Elevated rail deck visible between the towers on the upper level of the bridge.

entities.name: Oberbaumbrücke twin towers
entities.notes: Cylindrical brick turrets with conical roofs and finials that crown the bridge.

details.description: The image shows a street-side view in Berlin featuring the Oberbaumbrücke. Prominent red-brick towers with conical roofs and crenellated battlements frame a roadway along the Spree. Cars and a pedestrian are on the street in the foreground, while a modern building rises behind the historic brick structure under a cloudy sky. The overall scene juxtaposes a medieval-revival bridge aesthetic with contemporary urban surroundings, suggesting a location near the river on the Kreuzberg-Friedrichshain border.

entities.name: Oberbaumbrücke
entities.notes: Historic bridge across the Spree in Berlin; red brick construction with twin cylindrical towers and crenellated parapets.

entities.name: Spree River
entities.notes: River that the Oberbaumbrücke spans between Kreuzberg and Friedrichshain.

entities.name: Brick Gothic architecture
entities.notes: Brick construction with towers and crenellations; characteristic of late 19th-century German bridge design.

details.description: Street-level view approaching the Oberbaum Bridge (Oberbaumbrücke) in Berlin. The scene shows the red-brick arcade with pointed arches and crenellated parapet along the right, and two cylindrical brick towers with conical roofs topped by small sculptures rising above the bridge. Cars and a white delivery van are moving across the roadway; pedestrians walk on the left beside a cycle lane with graffiti-marked barriers. Modern buildings, including a gold-patterned facade, appear in the background under a cloudy sky.

photographer_location.name: Oberbaumbrücke (approach on the Kreuzberg side), Berlin, Germany

subject_location.name: Oberbaum Bridge (central twin towers over the River Spree), Berlin, Germany
Between Kreuzberg and Friedrichshain, Berlin, Germany

entities.name: Oberbaum Bridge (Oberbaumbrücke)
entities.notes: Double-deck bridge over the River Spree connecting Friedrichshain and Kreuzberg; red brick structure with arcades and twin towers. Built 1894–1896 (architect Otto Stahn); restored after German reunification in the 1990s with a new central span by Santiago Calatrava. Upper deck carries Berlin U-Bahn (U1/U3); lower deck carries road and pedestrians.

entities.name: Brick Gothic Revival (Backstein-Neogotik)
entities.notes: Characteristic red brick, pointed arches, crenellations, and conical turrets as seen on the Oberbaumbrücke.

entities.name: Friedrichshain–Kreuzberg
entities.notes: Berlin borough linked by the Oberbaum Bridge; the bridge forms a symbolic connection between the Friedrichshain and Kreuzberg districts.

details.description: Foreground shows a person wearing a tan coat with a bright blue strap from a bag, seen from behind, walking along a wide street. Across the street is the Oberbaumbrücke (Oberbaum Bridge) in Berlin, a striking red-brick Gothic Revival structure with two tall, rounded-tower gatehouses and crenellated parapets. The bridge spans the River Spree and carries road traffic as well as a lower deck for transit. Several modern cars and a white van are parked or driving along the street, contributing to a busy urban riverside scene. The sky is overcast with heavy clouds, giving the image a moody, weather-filled atmosphere and highlighting the brickwork and arches of the bridge. The overall setting is a riverfront district of Berlin, likely in Kreuzberg/Friedrichshain, near the historic bridge connecting the two neighborhoods.

entities.name: Oberbaumbrücke (Oberbaum Bridge)
entities.notes: Red-brick Gothic Revival bridge across the River Spree in Berlin; connects Friedrichshain and Kreuzberg; built in the 1890s; carries road traffic and the U-Bahn line U1.

details.description: A street-level photograph taken from a pedestrian perspective on a sidewalk, looking towards the iconic Oberbaumbrücke in Berlin under a cloudy, overcast sky. In the foreground, a person wearing a tan sweater and a blue strap walks away from the camera. The middle ground shows a busy street with tram tracks, occupied by a white van with "B&O BAU" branding and a grey Mercedes-Benz coupe. To the right, the red brick neo-Gothic architecture of the bridge's viaduct and one of its distinctive towers with a pointed spire is prominent. In the background to the left, across the river, the modern beige grid-patterned facade of the Cuvry Campus building is visible. Graffiti tags are noticeable on the concrete curb in the foreground.

entities.notes: Double-deck bridge crossing the River Spree, North German Brick Gothic style

details.description: A street-level view of the Oberbaumbrücke in Berlin, showing its iconic red brick Gothic Revival architecture. Two central towers with conical spires and decorative brickwork rise above the bridge's roadway. A series of pointed arches forms a gallery along the side. In the background, a modern building with a distinctive yellow and tan geometric patterned facade is visible. The foreground features a pedestrian from behind, wearing a brown sweater and a blue strap, walking on a sidewalk composed of cobblestones and asphalt. Traffic, including a white Opel van and several cars, is moving across the bridge. The sky is overcast with heavy grey clouds.

details.description: Street-level view of the Oberbaumbrücke in Berlin, a red-brick double-towered bridge with pointed conical spires and decorative crenellations. The bridge’s arcade of Gothic-style arches runs along the roadway, with parked cars beside it. Overcast sky, pedestrians in the foreground. The structure’s distinctive twin towers and brickwork identify it as the historic bridge linking Friedrichshain and Kreuzberg across the River Spree.

details.description: A red-brick medieval-style gate or fortress frontage with two rounded turret towers capped by conical roofs and a crenellated parapet. The central gateway features arched openings and decorative masonry, creating a fortress-like facade across a city street. Modern cars are parked along the curb, and a person wearing a tan sweater with a blue strap is visible in the foreground. The sky is overcast, contributing to a muted, cloudy atmosphere.

entities.name: Brick Gothic city gate with twin cylindrical towers
entities.notes: Red brick fortress gate featuring arched openings, crenellations, and conical-roof towers.

entities.name: Statue atop turret
entities.notes: Figure positioned on the summit of the central turret.

details.description: Street-level view of a red-brick, neo‑Gothic bridge with two distinctive conical‑spired towers and an arcaded walkway. Cars are parked along the curbside road in the foreground, pedestrians are visible, and a cloudy sky hangs overhead. The structure is the Oberbaum Bridge in Berlin, which links the districts of Friedrichshain and Kreuzberg and carries both road traffic/pedestrians and the U‑Bahn on its upper deck.

The brickwork is decorative with circular openings and crenellations along the top. Cars are parked along the street beside the gate, and a person wearing a tan sweater with a blue strap is visible in the foreground. The sky is overcast and the image appears slightly rotated.

details.description: A street-level photograph, rotated 90 degrees clockwise, capturing the distinctive red brick towers of the Oberbaumbrücke (Oberbaum Bridge) in Berlin against a cloudy sky. The bridge features Gothic Revival architecture with pointed spires, decorative brickwork, and arches. In the foreground (bottom right in corrected orientation), the back of a person wearing a tan sweater and blue strap is visible. To the right, several vehicles are parked along the curb, including a white service van with 'B&O' branding, a silver car, and a white car. The street features asphalt pavement with a cobblestone strip and a bike lane marking. Graffiti is visible on the curb stone. In the background, through and behind the bridge structure, a beige building with a grid-patterned facade (likely part of the Treptowers complex or nearby Friedrichshain architecture) can be seen.

details.description: A view of the Oberbaum Bridge (Oberbaumbrücke) in Berlin, Germany, captured from the bridge's pedestrian walkway. The image features the iconic twin red-brick towers with conical spires, built in the Brick Gothic Revival style. The bridge's architecture includes multiple pointed arches and decorative brickwork. In the background, a modern building with a distinctive yellow and black geometric patterned facade is visible. The sky is heavily overcast with grey clouds. Several vehicles, including a white van and a silver car, are parked along the roadway on the bridge. A person's head and shoulder are visible in the foreground, indicating a first-person perspective.
